entry.title: IELTs WRITING Notes
entry.content:
！！比较时注意前后比较对象要一致

TASK1

BASIS

  • 220 words

  • 机考格式：顶格对齐，隔行起段

  • 静态图：没有表明时间或者只有一个时间

  • 动态图：数据随时间变化

  • 示意图：流程图或者地图

静态图

常见表达

有关图表的词汇

  • 线图：line/curve graph
  • 饼图：pie chart
  • 表：table
  • 柱图：横向bar/ 竖向column chart
  • 流程图：flow chart
  • 地图：map

在第一位

  • be at the leading place/lead
  • rank the first place
  • shoot into the first place
  • come top
  • top the list
  • Had / enjoyed /boasted / accounted for(只有比例才能用) the largest / dominant / maximum number / figure / amount /proportion ,with
  • by far：修饰最高级或比较级：远远要/得多

关于…/就….而言

多个类才能用

  • in terms of
  • when it comes to
  • turning to
  • with regard to
  • as far as … be concerned

倍数

  • twice as high as/as much as…
  • there times as high as/as much as…

大约

  • approximately
  • about
  • around
  • roughly
  • more or less

百分比

  • percentage
  • proportion
  • rate
  • share

占比

  • account for
  • comprise
  • constitute
  • be compose of

数据引入

  • A(35%) $\to$ 直接使用括号引入
  • A, with 35%
  • A, at 35%
  • A, which accounts for 35%
  • A, accounting for 35%

比较

假设 A占比35%, B占比30%, C占比10%

  • A, with 35% is 5% higher/larger/more than B, at 30%

  • A, which accounts for 35% is over/above three times of C with only 10%

  • C(10% only) is less than/short of/below/under one third of A taking up as high as 35%

  • A 比 B 更…而 B 比 A 更… while the reverse was true

在接受高等教育总人数比例偏低的国家中男性比女性接受高等教育的比例高，在接受高等教育总人数比例高的国家中女性比男性接受高等教育的比例高

Overall, more females than males held qualification in countries with comparatively higher levels of higher education. While the reverse was true for countries with lower rates of tertiary education.

…的数量

  • 可数名词
    • the number of
    • the figure ==for==
  • 不可数名词
    • the quantity of
    • the amount of

第二大的数据

  • A … (which was)followed by B
  • Second, Meanwhile , was allocated /distributed to B with …

最小的数据

  • The least /Minimum /smallest rate /number / amount was found /seen /witnessed in C which …
  • C only accounted for 10% ranking the last in the list

表示两个数很接近

  • it is interesting /surprising to note /see that D and E took up approximately / exactly the equal proportion, at…
  • Interestingly /surprisingly ,D is similar /equal to E,with….
  • It is worth mentioning that D and E are similar /equal , at
  • It is noticeable that the smallest gender gap was found in H where

LAYOUT

开头（所有图都一样）

改写题目

  • 单图：what is clearly revealed in the given/following xxx(图的类型) is the data concerning …
  • 双图：the xxx and the yyy respectively indicate/illustrate … and …

中间段

在写中间段时，可以把题目类型分为三类

静态图的中间段包含：main features + connection + comparison

(如果main featrues和comparison在同一段才用得到connection)

Main Features
  • 引入 main features
    • Overall
    • On average
    • It is evident / manifest / apparent from the chart that …
    • As is clearly shown in the xxx
    • It can be clearly seen that …
  • 提炼 main features
    • 对大家来说，一个部分占比最大/两个部分加起来占比最大
    • 对大家来说，某一个部分占比最少
    • 看表格不同列的不同数据，但一定要注意特征的总体性，如果说表格中的某一项最大是不行的，
    • 特征多变/不确定总特征: vary a lot in ….(不确定特征的方面)
    • 如果是两幅图，一幅图提炼一个main feature，然后最后总结的时候再写两幅图大体的比较

In conclusion, the underground railway systems in different cities vary a lot in the size of the system, the number of passengers served per year and in the age of the system.

  • ==如果题目中出现 all/total ，直接在开头结束后写这个，然后再在此之后或在结尾总结Main Features==

    As is clearly shown, students in Country A spent more money than those in Country B and C (5000 versus 4500 dollars and 1500 dollars respectively)

Connection
  • to be more precise / more precisely
  • to be more exact / more exactly
  • to be more specific / more specifically
Comparison

  • 通过分类进行数据比较，类别 $\le 3$（如果有两幅图，写其中一幅图时，这幅图不要分类）,分类的原则是便于后面的数据比较

    • PS: 分类的方式不一定和 main feature 有关

    • 通过male/female分类

    • 占比的主次关系

      对于大学生的花销情况: 发现住宿和吃饭加起来比占比较多,就可以认为住宿和吃饭是主要的,其余的花销是次要的

    • 根据表格的列来分类(如果有两列的情况相似可以合并)

      e.g.

    发现southern part和northern part占比情况都差不多，所以可以合并成一类，westenr part单独为一类

  • 选择要写的数据

    • 最大的 / 最小的（同时写一写比较关系：如最大的数据是最小的数据的多少倍，最大的数据只比第二大的数据多了多少etc.）
    • 接近的 / 第二大的 (如果有两组接近的数据优先写这两组接近值，如果没有才写第二大的)
    • 注意：数据不能全都罗列，如果有5个数据最多写4个

  • 一类写一段，分类的类别放在每一段最前面

如果按照图中的性别进行分类 (male/female)，两段的段首可以这么写

  • In terms of man, those who held skilled vocational diploma took up substantially the maximum proportion…
  • Turing to women, the percentage of undergraduate diploma came top among the list….

结尾套句

In summary, the data in the charts clealry suggests…

动态图

LAYOUT

开头（所有图都一样）

改写题目

  • 单图：what is clearly revealed in the given/following xxx(图的类型) is the data concerning …
  • 双图：the xxx and the yyy respectively indicate/illustrate … and …

中间段

Main Features
  • 逐步上升/波动上升
  • 逐步下降/波动下降
  • 注意时态和时间要一致
  • 如果时间横跨过去和未来，或者只有现在到未来

as is clearly shown in the chart, the number ==is estimated/forecast/projected to== show an overall upward trend over the whole period mentioned.

Comparison
  • 按时间顺序
  • 起点、拐点、平稳、波动、终点、变化
  • 一定要引入数据的点是起点终点和拐点

常见表达

1.变化

上升
  • increase/grow/mount
  • show an upward trend
  • experience an increase
  • witness a growth
骤升
  • Soar/surge
下降
  • decrease/reduced/decline/drop
  • undergo a downward movement
  • suffer from a drop
骤降
  • plunge/slump
平稳

  • remain stable

  • maintain steady

  • stay constant

高位平稳
  • reach a plateau
低位平稳
  • level out/off
中间平稳
  • average out
最高点
  • reach the summit/zenith
最低点

bottom out

hit/reach the bottom/trough

波动

  • fluctuate

  • with some minor/striking/obvious/ fluctuation

尽管波动

in spite of some rises and falls

Depspite some ups and downs

2.引入数据

以…开始
  • start/begin/stand at …
到…
  • verb. to …
多少
  • increase by 90 from 10 to 100
到了最高点

  • peak at …

  • reach the peak of …

到了最低点

  • bottom out at …

  • hit the bottom at …

波动
  • fluctuate between … and …/from … to …
平稳
  • stay stable at …
以…结束
  • end/finish at …

3.程度

快 幅度大
adjadv
significantsignificantly
drasticdrastically
exponentialexponentially 成倍
慢 幅度小
adjadv
moderatemoderately
modestmodestly
gradualgradually

4.时间

  • in 2000
  • In the first decade 最开始的十年
  • in the initial 5 year 最开始的五年
  • in the next/following/subsequent 5 years 在接下来的五年
  • In the last 5 years 最后五年
  • till/until 直到
  • before /after 在之前/之后

句式

如何使用复杂句e.g.

  • After the figure decreased slightly to 0.9 billion in 1800,it surged to as high as 6 billion in 2000.
  • The figure decreased slightly to 0.9 billion in 1800,after which it surged to 6 billion in 2000.
  • before the figure surged to 6 billion in 2000,it had dipped slightyly to 0.9 billion in1800.
  • Starting at about 0.5 billion in 1400,the figure pulled through a slow but steady increase untill 1700 when it reached almost 1.1 billion.
  • The figure started at only 0.5 billion in 1400,which was followed by a slow but steady growth to reach around 1.1 billion in 1700.
  • the figure experienced a sharp increase between 1800 and 2000,by which time it had risen sharply from about 0.9 billion to 6 billion.

复杂图

  • 动态趋势：不断上升

  • 静态特征：上面比下面高，差距不断增大

  • million作为具体数据不要+s，作为单位+s

  • 图多的话写粗旷一些，图少就可以写细一点（例如动态图多选几个时间点）

A B两个对象

1.同一时间AB比较

2.先写A再写B

  • 第二种好写，因为A和B的拐点不同。

A B C三个对象

1.同一时间（段）写ABC

不一样那条先写，相近两条一起写

  • 第二种好写，因为A和B的拐点不同。

  • main feature：没有都上升或者都下降的->分开概括

A B C D四个对象

1.同一时间（段）写ABCD

2.分不同趋势描述变化：eg都下降的写一起

  • 还是第二种好写

  • 只能后面跟前面比，所以把如果一类有三个对象而另一个只有一个对象，把有三个对象的放在前面先写方便比较

  • 不要一段很大，如果一段很大分下段

只有两个时间点

  • 按照时间来写可能会比较好写

还有一种写法

开头 ：(总…上升) 同样升->ABC ,相反->DEF下降

第二段：最大、…..最小 ……第二 ……

结尾 ：开头 +总

也就是说可以把所有的上升下降趋势写在第一段中，第二段再根据最大最小值来引入数据，会比较方便，因为在写上升下降趋势的时候可能只能引入部分的最大最小值甚至无法引入最大最小值，可能会比较难写

流程图

开头：改写题目 + 总步骤

中间：具体步骤先后描述

结尾：总结

1.一般现在时态

2.用被动be done开头（不要用people we开头）

3.顺序词

  • 第一动作 firstly/first of all/in the first stage/the first step is…
  • 接下来 next/then/after that/and then/following that/subsequently/in the next stage/the next step is….
  • 最后动作 finally/in the final stage/the final step is…/the whole process ends when…

4.句式变换

when/while/once/after/before/till/until/which/where/when/in which

so that…/in order that…

having been done…/…is done …

These procedures having been completed, sth is/are done….

地图

开头：改写题目 + all/total（没有给的话不用写）

中间：一个时间一段，统一方向

结尾：图表总结

1.方位

be located/sited/situated in（范围内）/on（相接）/to（相隔） the east of…

be directly opposite to..

be in the northwestern corner of…

be in the center/central area/middle of…

be along the roadside /riverside

be at the southern end of the river

Be halfway between… and …

be at the southeasten conrner of…

2.变化

大小the size of … is expanded/enlarged / reduced by nearly a half.

数量the number of … increased/decreased/doubled/tripled to 600.

消失… vanished / disappeared /were removed.

A被B取代

A is replaced/substituted by B

A把B取代

A give way to B

A makes way for B

新建的

… is/newly established/constructed/built in…

…is added to ….

the year 2000 saw two additions in 地方 …

3.连接

并列

at the same time, in the meantime, meanwhile, besides, additionally, waht is more, moreover, furthermore, in the same year, also

有门就找门，没门就随便

连接不要用walking into …. 主语要是人 在地图中不用 就用additionally，what’s more啥的

不用所有变化都写

go beyond it 在上面

TASK2

一.审题

题目一般是statement +question(s)

question决定文体布局

1.同意与否型

可以不两边倒

do you agree or disagree=to what extent do you agree or disagree?

what is your opinion?

what do you think of it?

必须两边倒

==discuss both these views and give your own opinion.==

==Which is more/main…?==

structure
两边倒

开头 不表态

正方 最好写两个理由

反方 最好写两个理由

结尾表态

一边倒
  • fully

开头表态

理由1

理由2

（理由3）

结尾重申

  • partly

开头表态

理由1

理由2

让步段…对立面…反驳（提一嘴对立面再踩一下）（或者把让步段放在开头表态的后面）

结尾重申

2.利弊型

利

benefits

advantages

positive effects

strengths

upsides

merits

blessings

pros

弊

drawbacks

disadvantages

negative effects

weeknesses

downsides

demerits

curses

cons

structure

开头

利 两个理由

弊 两个理由 +（反驳）

结尾

（利弊顺序无所谓，写得好的放在前面）

3.原因解决，问题解决，原因问题型

原因

why/cause n./reason/lead to

问题

problem/effects/consequence

解决

how（有可能不是）/solve/tackle/improve/do about/solution/measures/suggest(ion)

structure
原因解决

开头

==原因 2个理由==（重点）

解决 2个理由

结尾

问题解决

开头

==问题 2个理由==（重点）

解决 2个理由

结尾

原因问题型

开头

==原因 2个理由==（重点）

问题 2个理由

结尾

4.混合型（利弊+解决，同意与否+原因…）

do you agree … benefits >? drawbacks?

  • 用利弊的布局

开头

原因

利/弊

结尾

5. 特殊型—问什么答什么

二.文体布局

观点方向

1.方便便利

2.效率

3.节省浪费

4.安全危险

5.身心健康

6.人际关系

7.环境污染

8.娱乐

9.科技经济

10.文化教育

11.道德伦理

12.权利

13.社会

14.个人

15.政府

  • 写问题的解决时：最好个人角度写一个，政府角度写一个

三.开头的写法

1.背景

2.==点题==

3.表态/打算

4.预告内容

eg.背景+表态/预告内容（上面4个可以任意组合）

in recent years, thousands of and millions of people have been traveling to various destinations in different countries. Therefore, arguments have come up concerning whether this phenomenon brings about more positive or negative effects. I personally hold that there are more benefits than drawbacks of it. / This essay aims to explore the upsides and downsides of international tourism.

The rapid development of modern technology has made it possible for mobile phones to be widely applied in the society, which are causing many problems in terms of society, medication and technique while offering us convenience and various entertainment. Personally speaking, I think that there are more disadvantages than advantages of it.

四.主题句

笼统主题句：总起、方向作用，无内容

具体主题句：归纳、概括全段

1.简单明了

2.不能太泛-off topic

3.不能太细-example/fact

4.具有原创性

Backers of… do renter some reasons.

Eg do you agrees are necessary.

正

  1. education 2.conservation

  • Backers of zoos do renter some reasons.

  • Zoos aid education and conservation.

反

1.violate animals’ rights 2.resource consuming

  • Opponents of zoos, however, present some reasons.

  • Zoos,however,are a violation of anmials’ rights and a waste of resource

可以笼统，可以具体

Why Movie stars and excellent athletes earn a lot of money is reasonable.

Movie stars and excellent athletes earn a lot of money by their talent and hardworking.

五.内容

point + reason +example

举例

as an illustration

cases in point are that…

a real life example is that…

This can be best indicated in the example that…

Best illustrated of this is the example that….

take .. as anexample.

reason

…because/in that/since…

… for the reason that…

this is mainly because…

this is primarily due to the fact that…

the root reason lies in that…

as we all know, …

it is universally acknowledged that…

egP27.1

利:tourism has many benefits/tourism is economically and culturally beneficial. for one thing,it is able to boost the local economic development for the simple reason that more money will be circulated in the host country. The more tourists visit the country and spend money there, the better it is for the economy. As an illustration, local vendors and shops can make great profits via selling more goods such as souvenirs and specialties to rourists. For another, tourism is helpful to accelerate the international cultural communication.This is mainly because travelers from all over the world can experience the local culture and customs and build connections with the local. A real life example is that when American pay a visit to China, they can enjoy traditional Chinese food, such as …, …… and communicate with local residents about their unique lifestyle and 5000-years history of China.

2.数据

according to a recent report,

In line with reliable statistics, …

in accordance with a recent poll, …

the recent researching findings have shown that …

3.对比

… 相反 …

on the contrary

in contrast,

by contrast

However,

on the other hand,

computer vs teachers

the internet vs library

discipline vs freedom

Parks vs apartment

Fast fodd vs taditional food

electronic books vs paper books

parents vs teachers

Eg paper books are far more physically beneficial to people. As we all know, they are mainly made from some natural materials such as woods or bamboos.On the contrary, electronic books are much more likely to bring about some radiation-related diseases such as headache, dizzeiness and even brain cancer and so forth.

Shortsightedness

4.假设 if…

A good mood is beneficial to our health. If people fail to…

5.解释

that is to say…

in other words

By this, I mean…

to be more precise…

More precisely

eg

People are easily influenced by unhealthy things that they read, see and hear.

By unhealthy, I mean such thing that may promote sexual inequality, selfishness, violence and pornography.

六.结尾（不要提新的观点）

in conclusion

in summary

1.重申/表态

2.归纳内容

数据放前面，时间放后面

to 5% till 2021
entry.summary: ！！比较时注意前后比较对象要一致

entry.title: IELTs SPEAKING Notes
entry.content:
听不懂时

  • 如果完全不懂
    • sorry?
    • could you say that again pls?
  • 不懂某个词
    • What’s the meaning of XXX?
    • What does XXX mean?
  • 如果大概懂
    • Do you mean XXX ?

词汇和表达

  • earn my own bread

  • big fortune

  • Starry night

  • picturesque 风景如画的 adj.

  • Underpaid = not paid well 酬不抵劳

  • By reading extensively, students can gain/obtain/acquire/expand their knowledge in different fields.

  • aurora 极光

  • the milky way 银河

  • shooting star/meteor 流星

  • intriguing 有趣的

  • tedious 冗长的 乏味的

  • bunk bed 高低床

  • Thrilling plots 刺激情节

  • Thriller / horror movie 恐怖片

  • Recharge one’s batteries/loosen up

  • be immersed in

  • Hustle and bustle 生活的烦嚣

  • crack sb. up 逗笑

  • punch line 梗

  • burst into laughter

  • it hinges on sth.=it depends

  • Lie in/wake up naturally 赖床/自然醒

  • have one-day off 有一天的休息

  • Apply oneself to do sth.

  • be doom to failure / end in failure 失败

发音

Harmonious

mistake I made

经常破句！！！->先说句子主干，一定要说完整的句子出来

  • on the weekdays/At the weekend

Part1

答题逻辑

  • direct response+(reason)+details/examples
  • 不能讲原因的时候 focus on details(relevant experience->when../every time…/the moment…)
  • 当问题用虚拟语气提问，要用过去式和过去将来时回答u

答题技巧

  • 要注意不要犯基础语法错误

  • 具像化:eat food => eat sth./delicacies/snacks

  • 如果不太熟悉问题：I’m not a big fan with…/it’s not my cup of tea, but I can try…

  • 尽量多用话题词

  • 先说句子主干

GA

  • 简单句复合句结合

  • 时态的准确运用

  • 从句

  • 比较级&最高级

  • 被动语态

使用无意义连接词

  • Well, …

  • Actually, …

  • You know, (众所周知的内容)…

  • In fact, …

  • To be honest/frank, …

  • Honestly/ Frankly, …

  • What I mean is …

  • I suppose …

有意义的连接词

时间、地点、方式、目的状语提前，可以争取思考时间

  • 时间

    • In 2020,
    • Last summer vacation,
    • In my childhood,
    • Currently,
    • At the moment,
    • In the recent years,

  • 地点

    • At school,
    • At home,
    • On the campus, ..
    • In China,
    • In some foreign countries, …

  • 目的

    • In order to do …,

  • 方式

    • By doing, …
添加信息
  • Also, …
  • Besides,…
  • What’s more,…
  • Morover,…
  • In addition,…
  • Additionally,…
  • On top of that, …
转折/对比/让步
  • but
  • On the other hand,…
  • On the contrary, …
  • while…
  • although…
  • However, …
举例
  • For instance, …
  • For example, …
  • such as …,
  • like…

拓展details的方式

1.当所问的问题完全没有涉及过时

  • 用if

  • 用虚拟语气

    • If I were…, I would do…
    • If i were a teacher, i wouldn’t care about the students’ academic performance.
    • If i were a mayor, i wouldn’t know how to give a presentation …

  • eg

    • Have you ever tried any extreme sports?

      No, I haven’t, because it’s very terrifying. When i was young, my uncle, who was a skateboarder, broke his legs in a competition. (At that moment, I swore that i would never tried this kind of sports. )

2.分类讨论，对比

  • ==it depends（on sth）. / Well, it hinges on sth.==

  • I usually enjoy …, but I also tend to/I also am likely to do …. from time to time.

    Doing sth. is a good choice for me, ….. But,/ Yet,/ However, I may do …every once in a while.

eg

1.What do you do to relax?
Regularly- do some workouts to take a break You know, sitting in front of the computer for a whole day is pretty tiring.
However, during a longer holiday-> travel/ historical sites.

2.Are you into car journey?

It depends.- As a driver/, going on a road trip/ concentrate on the road/ traffic/ ..,which makes me nervous …
If i am a passenger/ chat freely / that’s okay for me

更多对比法

  • 时空对比

    • (used to do/ but currently)

  • 相反意见(P3常用)

Is your hometown a nice place for tourists to visit?

I would say yes, because there are a number of picturesque tourist attractions, such as …. .（Sun Yatsan Memorial Hall） Although it’s getting more and more crowded, the visitors can still travel to their destinations efficiently by public transport.

准备Part1/3话题的example 5w+1h

traveling

  • what
    • what kind travel do you prefer?
      • in group
      • self-driving trip
    • what can we do?
      • take part in some outdoors activities
      • capture the beauty of the scenery through my lens/can’t help pressing the shutter/take photos of the spectacular scenery
  • who
    • whith my near and dear ones
  • when
    • last summer vacation
    • during the low(peak) season
  • why
    • experience the local culture /make friends with the locals
    • improve my oral English (English proficiency)
  • where
    • historical sites/ place of interest / tourist attractions/Scenic spots
  • how
    • how do you travel?
      • by air/by sea/ by high-speed rail
    • How do you feel?
      • with excitement

Part2

人事地物（160-180/200 words）

练习 2:15min左右

追加问题

  • 动作提示继续

  • anything else？

  • 具体问题：根据你故事或题卡

P2回答完，收题卡

P2 - 框架：以框架为基础，配合小问（全覆盖）

  • 避免一问一答

  • 避免说理性的回答（firstly，secondly… the reason is…）

人物类

串题：考虑熟悉领域

Study：Computer science
Hobbies：TV programs food Edit videos
Sports: basketball/ Computer games

Study:
*A person who impressed you most when you were in primary school
*A foreign person who you have heard or known that you think is interesting
*A person you don’t like but have to be friendly with新题( group discussion/ professor)
*A person you only met once and want to know more about 新题 （比赛… ）
*A person who solved a problem in a smart way(比如某一次编程比赛）
*A creative person whose work you admire （制作software）

Hobbies:food

*A person who you follow on social media. 新题
*Someone you really like to spend time with 新题
*A person whose work is useful to the society 新题 (利用技能或特长去帮人）

其他

*A famous person you are interested in (Tim Cook/MJ)
*A famous athlete that you know (basketball player)
*A businessman you admire(Tim Cook-变熟人)

框架

  • Who & how you know them(+ first impression)

  • (appearance) - 可有可无

  • personality

    • Plan A：1 personality：2-3个小例子<每个一句话>+1个具体例子<3-5句>（重点在人物，而不在故事）；
    • plan B：1 personality：相关例子；1 personality：相关例子。

  • what they do/did

开头

I would like to talk about XXX,_______(同位语)，+who(定从+同替扣题)

I have known him for donkey’ s years.

How you knew this person(+first impression)
  • Since i was in high school, I have known him for donkey’s years. On the first day of school, the moment i saw him, i was impressed by his broad smile and sparkling / cheerful eyes. Gradually, i found he was really an outgoing person.
如何使appearance和personality 相关

  • lanky(tall & thin) -basketballer / basketball player

  • Muscular - athlete

  • Overweight - Nowadays, a great number of people are crazy about fast food, so some of them have become overweight.

  • petite 娇小的

    • 正向关联： she is a shy and petite girl.
    • 反向关联： Although she is a little bit petite, she is one of the most courageous girls I’ve ever met.
Personality PlanA
1 personality+3 例子

  • Social/ gregarious / outgoing

    1. Greet others with a broad smile / every time she meets someone on campus

    2. Take part in some volunteer activities/ be willing to give a hand to the people in need

    3. In class/ raise her hand / first one / to answer the teachers’ questions

  • Every time she meets her acquaintances on campus, she always greets them with a broad smile. During the summer vacation, she definitely takes part in some volunteer activities and she is willing to give a hand to the people in need. In class, she is always the first one to raise her hand to answer the teachers’ questions.

  • Industrious/ diligent

    • In order to achieve her goal in a competition, she applies herself to program and analyze the data and even sleeps over in the lab.
    • During the /Every summer holiday, she gives up her leisure time in order to gain some knowledge about her major in advance.
    • Moreover, when she has done some experiments with bad results, she still doesn’t give up and try it again and again.

  • Sweet-tempered

    • Every time we have a group discussion about our assignment at school, sometimes we argue with each other, but she is always the most patient listener.Somehow, when people misunderstand her, instead of losing her temper to fight with the gossipers, she doesn’t care about it at all. During the summer vacation, she always invites us to have a home-made dinner together, which makes us feel warm.
具体例子
  • I still remember, last year, …
结尾（1-2句）：
  • To be honest, + 扣题同替+总结前文

somehow 莫名其妙的

eg.

Describe someone you really like to spend time with.

You should say

  • Who this person is

  • How you knew him/her

  • What you usually do together

  • And explain why you like to spend time with him/her

Since i was in high school, I have known him for donkey’s years. On the first day of school, the moment i saw him, i was impressed by her broad smile and sparkling / cheerful eyes. Gradually, i found she was really an outgoing person. Every time she meets her acquaintances on campus, she always greets them with a broad smile. During the summer vacation, she definitely takes part in some volunteer activities and she is willing to give a hand to the people in need. In class, she is always the first one to raise her hand to answer the teachers’ questions.

地点类

串题
小地方：

*A cafe you like to visit

*A place in a village that you visited 新题

*A place you visited on vacation and would like to recommend it to others

*A place that you visited but don’t want to visit ever again 新题 （和想去的地方的素材反着说就好）

（ messy/ dirty/ be in a mess/ services/ welcome us / glass cabinet with nothing in it./
Plates 盘子 on the table/ be cleaned and tidied up / have a seat on a sofa / not soft at all/ feel comfortable / When we waited for our food/ French window / dirty / cannot see the scenery outside)

*A new place you visited 新题

A house or an apartment you would like to live in 新题
(dream house/ dream about living in a ….
According to my plan, it should be well-decorated / there would be a …. on the left)
balcony: enjoy the beautiful scenery/ view/ see the sunrise /bedroom / French window ) / living room – a big wooden table/ have a big dinner / sofa / sit on it / watch the TV programs )

大地方：

A city that you think is interesting

A city that you think is fmous

框架

  • location

  • environment + activities (有机结合：提及一个物体顺便加上相应活动)

相关词汇
  • Stool 高脚凳
  • Exquisited /well-decorate 精致的
  • barista 咖啡师/bar tender 酒保
  • paint sth. into xxx 把sth.涂成xxx色
  • chandelier 大吊灯 - dusky
  • ceiling lamp 小吊灯
  • 前面那个东西包含后面那个东西形容用名词，例如math test，history museum

Eg. café

glass cabinet - with a lot of yummy / tasty /delicious / palatable cakes / desserts / snacks in it

Bar counter+stool - barista 咖啡师/bar tender 酒保 （make coffee）/

a leather sofa with some colorful and soft cushions on it - have a chitchat with my friends / order … some pieces (slices) of Tiramisu/cheese cakes /brownies/cup cakes

Drink :cappuccino /Americano(long black)

French window - appreciate the beauty of cityscape / natural beauty (scenery) of the suburban area

what you can do：

buy the latest novels/ bestsellers, /buy/grab a cup of coffee everyday,enjoy the melodious music….

小地方：用第一视角

  • walking into…

  • next to …/opposite …/nearby/in the corner/on the 2ed floor/in the backyard.

Describe a café you like to visit.
You should say

  • Where it is
  • What kinds of food and drinks it serves
  • What you do there
  • And explain why you like to go there.

eg:

I would like to talk about a cafe called Luckin,which located in the heart of city.Since it is adjacent to my campus,I grap a cup of coffee pretty much every week.

since it is a well-decorated two-story café, it is pretty popular among all the students.

walking into the cafe/coffee shop,I can see a glass cabinet with a lot of yummy cakes and snacks in it. Usually,i spend 1 or 2 minutes taking a look at it.

Next to the cabinet,a exquiste bar counter stands there. As I’m familiar with the barista,I enjoy seeing hoe he makes coffee when I visit there alone.

Opposite the counter, there are small round wooden tables along with a leather sofa,I love this cozy croner best because i can have a chit chat with my friends,ordering some pieces of cheese cakes.

补充:(in the corner shop,there is a French window, from which I can appreciate the beauty of cityscape/matural beauty of the suburban area.)

to be honest, I ‘m fond of enjoying a whole afternoon in this cafe not only because of its cozy enviroment but also because of its delicacies.

大地方

如果题目是：

interesting：Modern but historic

famous：be famous for its modrn facilities and long history

modern：

  • city center：skyscrapers：(landmark:Canton Tower：appreciate the panorama(全景) of the city/cityscape)

  • amusement park - castle / tourist / a must-go place

  • (Office blocks - multinational companies - job opportunities)

Historic:

  • historical sites:chen clan academy/know more about the local culture

  • Traditional food - local restraurant - be established for hundreds of years/ at the weekend,/tourists(residents) line up

Describe a city that you think is interesting.
You should say

  • Where it is
  • What the city is famous for
  • Why it is interesting
  • And explain how you feel about it

Eg.（记得时刻cue问题，interesting cue interesting ，famous cue famous）

I would like to talk about GZ,which is locate in the southern China.since it is a modren but historic city, a lot tourists find it intersting to visit.

First of all , it is equipped with modren facilities ,including skyscrapers and all kinds of entertainment venues.toursit attractions.in the city center,there are landmarks, such as the canton tower.with the high-speed elevator,people can reach the fooftop within only 1 minute. After that,they can appreciate the panprama of the whole city.Besides,it is famous for the Changlong amusement park,which is a must-go destination. You can enjoy all kinds of amusement there,like rollercoaster ,haunted house,etc.

At the same time ,the city is really famous for its long history.There are many historical sites like chen clan academy and many history museums which display / exhibit a great nunber of antiques.What’s more ,this city is renowned /well-known for its food culture.You can find a lot of Cantonese dishes/chuisine.at the weekend,walking in the street,you can see a lot of tourists even residents line up in front of doors.

To be honest, i consider it as an interesting city not only because of its advanced infrastructure but also because of its long history.

事件类

串题

Events: (11 topics) 动作点
Study/ hobby
*A time when you got up early (burn the midnight oil to do / stay up late/ set several alarm clocks / wake myself up/ the moment … heard the ring of the clock / jump out of my bed…/ make a cup of coffee to refresh myself / review/arrive at the venue / )
*A lesson you remember/learned 新题
*A happy event you organized 新题 (organize : reserve a large conference room// invite … instructor / judges )
*A time when you gave advice to others (ask / analyze / make a plan for …)
*A time when you felt proud of a family member

*A time when you waited for something special that would happen (divert my attention / absent-minded / the result of a competition / experiment / offer/ the score of university entrance examination )
*A difficult decision that you once made ( major/school/ whether i should study abroad)

*An interesting discussion 新题(different ideas)

*A good service you received -restaurant
(welcome / with a broad smile / lead us to our seats/ french window / have a better view … /menu/ introduce/ recommend their signature dishes to us patiently / hospitable /refill our cups with hot tea /
*A time when you moved to a new home/school
（ pack my luggage / depressed- say goodbye to my old friends/ comfort zone / on the day i moved to … / nervous but excited /heart keeps beating fast /on the way/ boarding school / boarding student/ get off / look around / be fascinated by the … environment ）

步骤

During (罗列出重要动作点- 按动作的关联程度分组<阶段>- 用语法串联动作- 考试时： 每个阶段选1-2 关键词

eg

Describe a good service you received. （restaurant）
You should say
What the service was
When you received it
Who you were with

Popular

Waiting

Lemonade and snacks

Enter and sit

sudd Menu

intro the signature dish

refill the tea

Befor leaving

Ask us for advice

Describe a time when you got up early （before you sleep-）
You should say
When it was
What you did
Why you got up early
And how you felt about it

before

had Packaged my stuff

had gone to bad early

had set the alarm

Took the metro to the train station

people crowed

afraid can’t catch the bus

But since I arrived quite early

物体类框架

type

source(怎么得到或者知道的)

description(appearance/content(客观描述)+functions/features(主观描述))

(Experience related to it)如果前面描述足够，这部分可以不提

Values

Eg

media

eontent:4-5句

an exiting book that you enjoy reading(读后感)

Content:4-5句(总结内容:起承转合)

Features:plots/characters/writing style/…

An interesting song

Content:summarize the story

Features:

a piece of local news that people are interested in

(a new library可以套一个地点类/title/article/reporter)

the moment I read the title, … attracted. advanced

Facilities/in the article/reporter:10-storey/books/in order to let the readers know more about the interior design/photos/graphs/… in detail
entry.summary:
听不懂时

  • 如果完全不懂
    • sorry?
    • could you say that again

entry.title: IELTs SPEAKING Materials
entry.content:
Part One:

I am presently a fourth-year undergraduate student at …. University. My major is….. because…

golden opportunity –perfect change

to make my castle in the air “dream” come true

very—highly—extremely

I feel over the moon—“happy”

tedious/ dull/ pain in the neck/boring

*Hometown

  • Where are you from?

  • Can you describe your hometown? 第二部分卡片提前

I‘m from Guiyang ,which is in the western part of China and it’s a mountainous region which isn’t coastal.

mountainous coastal

  • ==Is your hometown a good place for families with children?==

pictureques- breath-taking

yes,weather is pleasant,many natural sceneries such as Qianling mountain park,Huangguoshu waterfall , suitable for family travel

  • ==Is your hometown a good place for children to grow up?==

no,Although the living condition is pleasant /habitable.the education resource is pool

  • Is your hometown a city or in the countryside?

actually,it has changed a lot,when I was little, it was more like a suburb,but in the past 10 years,skyscrapers has been rising like jagged teeth.

  • Do you love to live in your hometown?

Yes,delicacies ,weather is pleasant,life style is slow

  • Do you wish to live in the city or in the countryside?

Compare with living in the suburb,I prefer urban life which transportation is convenient and entertainment is various.

  • ==Is your hometown a good place for living?==

Yes,delicacies ,weather is pleasant,life in the city is slow

especially with cool weather during summertime

  • What is your hometown famous for?

Chinese baijiu.

  • What is the most famous tourist attraction in your hometown? 第二部分卡片提前

  • I must say Huangguoshu Waterfall ,landmark, biggest waterfall in asia

  • How much do you know about your hometown?

  • Did you learn history of your hometown when you were younger?

Actually,Although I’ve been visiting many historical sites in my hometown, I can’t memorize many details such as historical events and the exact date when they happend. I’m not that into history .

  • ==Does your school teach the history of your hometown?==

Yes ,but not that much.Over the path of history, many famous people were living in my hometown, one of whom I like the best is Wang Yangming, a renowned philosopher who has made a significant impact in the philosophical history of China.

  • Will you continue to live there for a long time?

no,make a living in big city, more opportunities

*Living area/living city

  • Where do you live now?

  • Can you describe the city you are living? 第二部分卡片提前

Guangzhou,which is one of the biggest city in China. Congested ,but,Cantonese traditional food is tasty

  • Do you wish to live in the countryside?

Compare with living in the suburb,I prefer urban life which transportation is convenient and entertainment is various.

  • Do you like you living city?

I would say yes,Although the city is always crowded with people,but Cantonese traditional food is tasty

*Home/Accommodation

  • What is your ideal accommodation like? 第二部分卡片提前

It doesn’t have to be very big,

  • ==What kind of accommodation did you live in your childhood?==

a small flat with many kids lived around, I played with them a lot after I finished my homework,whcich left me good memories.

  • Do you live in a house or flat?

Well,my apartment is big enough for my 3-people household and what is special is that it has a very large balcony which my mom raises some flowers and vegetables on it. By the way ,on the balcony ,it is really cozy when basking under the warm sunshine.

  • ==What do you enjoy most about it?==

Well lit

The house/apartment is filled with enough sunshine/light

  • Which part of your home do you like most?

big balcony, raise some vegetables and flowers, well lit(采光好) ,cozy ->basking under the sunshine

  • ==Do you plan to live there for a long time?==

No ,after graduate,I plan to move out,make a living,in a big city which has more opportunities . So I think I need to have a lease on my own apartment

  • ==Do you live with your parents?==

Yes,as I’m still a student without payment,I can’t afford a flat,but after graduate,I plan to move out,make a living in another city and rent my own apartment.

  • ==Do you like the neighborhood where you live?==

Yeah,sure.my neighbors are quite friendly and always help each other.On some Chinese traditional festival occasions, we would pay a visit to their home, btring them not only some homemade food, but also warm greetings

  • ==How is the surrounding of your current living place?==

1.It’s hustle and bustle. There are many snack bars and resaurants along the street near my flat ,I ‘m really into hanging out and catching some street food which is tasty and has reasonable price.

2.The place where I live is quite a cozy area, especially with cool weather during summertime; my apartment locates in a mountainside,(半山腰) where we can find wild animals like monkeys everywhere, they are cute but sometimes can be annoying because they are pretty naughty, always trying to grab food from us.

  • Is there anything that you want to change in your living place?

Actually ,it really has. many vehicles ->fork(岔路口)->traffic jam.build another road/widen the fork

  • Are you willing to live in the countryside in the future?

Compare with living in the suburb,I prefer urban life which transportation is convenient and entertainment is various.

  • Do you prefer living in a house or a flat?

flat. House is too big to keep it clean and tidy. a smaller housing makes me feel more secure.

  • What is difference between living in a house and an apartment?

House:bigger ,have more priavcy

apartment: easy to clean, a sense of security

*Public gardens and Parks

  • Did you often go to parks when you were a child?

Yes,I was fond of outdoor activities as a kid,so my mom always brought me to parks so I can play with other kids.

  • Would you prefer to visit a private garden or public garden?

public garden,I also wanna communicate with others when appreciating the natural landscape.

  • Do people in your country like to go to parks?

Yes as a dog owner. Every time I go to parks I can see… walk dogs, jogging around the park. picnic.

  • Are there many parks in your city?

No,the housing supply is in shortage in china so I guess the government are not allowed to distribute many lands to build parks.

  • Would you like to have fun in a public garden or park?

Yes,I enjoy appreciaitng the natural landscape and as a dog owner,It’s always amusing when playing boomerang with my dog in parks .throw and fetch

  • What do you like to do when you are in a park?

walk my dog,appreciate the natrual scenery

  • Have you been to a park recently?

No, due to the Corona virus,we are not allowed to go out and confined in the school. I can remember last time I went to a park was half a year ago.

*Street market

  • Do you often go to the street market?

I like hustle and bustle. I ‘m really into hanging out in street market with various snack bars and restaurants ,catching some street food which is tasty and has reasonable price.

  • What do you usually buy in the street market?

virant：有烟火气的

  • Do you prefer to go shopping in shopping malls or the street market?

In shopping mall,I’m a man who trust in brand so I’m worried about buying fake product (no insurance )with bad quality.so I always purchase through the proper channels

  • What are the things that people usually buy in street markets?
  • When was the last time you went to a street market?
  • When was the last time you went to a night market?
  • Are there many street markets in China?

especially in some small contriside and town, as the rent of a shop is expensive, tons of people earn a living in the street markets.

*Mirror

  • Do you like looking at yourself in the mirror?
  • How often do you look at yourself in the mirror?

yeah,sort of.I look at myself in the mirror every morning before I go out to check my haircut and whether there are some spots on my face or teeth.I don’t wanna leave a sloppy impression of appearance ==on== others.

  • Have you ever bought a mirror?

yes,I bought a tiny mirror when I was in high school because of the poor living condition in our school dormitory,there was no mirror in the school dormitory. we had to prepare by ourselves.

  • Would you use mirrors to decorate your room?

No definitely not.I’ve seen a lot of thrillers which contain plots of ghost coming out of the mirror or people getting sucked into it, which haunts me a lot.

  • Who cares more of their appearance, boys or girls?

I’m not trying to be stereotype… girls / most of them have makeup so they may need to check their dressing regularly.

  • Do you buy clothes without looking at the mirror?

Yes,it’s normal that people nowadays are buying clothes on the internet including me. Unless you pay at first you won’t get a delivery of your stuff.but I think it’s ok that even if the clothes don’t suit me I can return the goods instead.

==Purchase my outfits on the internet, which means I have no chance to try them on in front of the mirror.==

==As soon as i receive the package/delivery,I will put them on to see if the clothes fits/suits me well.==

  • Do you like a lot of mirrors in your house?

No definitely not.I’ve seen a lot of thrillers which contain plots of ghost coming out of the mirror or people getting sucked into it, which haunts me a lot.

  • Do you usually take a mirror with you?

No, I don’t have makeup so I don’t have to look myself in the mirror very often.

  • Is there a mirror in your house?

Collect things

  • Do you collect things?
  • Are there any things you keep from childhood?

NO, since I ‘ve moved a house when I was in primary school, There are too many stuffs needed to be carried, most of my collection in my childhood were considered as rubbish and thrown away.

  • Where do you usually keep things you collect?

Cabinet

Advertisements

  • How often do you see advertisement?

I can say every moment every time I watch a video even the video is only maybe one minutes I have to watch a clip of an ad and every time I walk on the street or in the subway station I can see very very big posters on the wall about some electronic devices or clothing brand.

  • What kind of advertisement do you enjoy?
  • I prefer ads that are creative. And I want it more like a story than an ad.
  • What kind of advertisements do you dislike?

I don’t like advertisement that brainwash people. they are repeating the name of their brand or their slogan over and over again, which are really really annoying.

  • Do you think advertisement influences people’s decisions?

well it depends. Some people may be influenced but not me I don’t trust a single word the ads are trying to brainwash me, I only believe in the data, statistics and evaluation from the real customers.

Dreams (南昌，成都，澳大利亚)

  • Do you often remember your dreams?

  • How often do you remember your dreams?

from time to time. only part of it. can’t remember many details. if the plot is thrilling and uncomplicated. I can remember more.

==cant remember very well==

  • Are you interested in others’ dreams?
  • Do you share your dreams with others?

Hardly. Mostly I can just remember parts of my dreams,I think it would be dull to share a story whitout any detail to others. They may not take much interest into it.

==Seldom do I do so.==

  • Do you think it is necessary to study dreams?
  • Will you be interested in dream research?

yes I do,I ‘ve seen a lot of sci-fi about dreams like inception and the the matrix. These kind of things make me believe that dreams can reflect a person’s mind or heart or even predict the future.

  • Do you want to make your dreams come true?

It hinges on the type of the dream.as a nightmare ,I bet no one would like to see it come true. in the other hand,People always wish that their herioc dreams or dreams about achieving some unbelievable goals can come true.

  • Do you think dreams have special meanings?

yes I do,I ‘ve seen a lot of sci-fi about dreams like inception and the the matrix. These kind of things make me believe that dreams can reflect a person’s mind or heart or even predict the future.

TV programs

Stranger Things is set in the fictional rural town of Hawkins, Indiana, during the early 1980s. The nearby Hawkins National Laboratory performs scientific research for the United States Department of Energy, but secretly does experiments into the paranormal and supernatural, including those that involve human test subjects. Inadvertently, they have created a portal to an alternate dimension, “the Upside Down”. The influence of the Upside Down starts to affect the unknowing residents of Hawkins in calamitous ways.

Sitting down

Where is your favorite place to sit down?

I prefer to simmer down in my gaming chair in my dormitory. Besides, it’s quite soft and I feel as snug as a bug in a rug.

Vocabulary: simmer down

Cohesive: Besides

idioms: as snug as a bug in a rug

Do you always sit down for a long time?

Definitely because I am majoring in software engineering. Additionally, I have a considerable number of matters that I have to accomplish, such as burning the midnight oil in a coding program. It always take

Vocabulary: Definitely “yes”/ considerable number of “many”/accomplish “finish”

Cohesive: Additionally

idioms: burning the midnight oil

Do you feel sleepy when you are sitting?

It depends on the circumstances. On the other hand, if I hit the hay earlier, I will definitely recharge my batteries. By contrast, if I burn the midnight oil, I will definitely feel drowsy all day, even though I stand.

When you were a kid did you usually sit on the floor?

sure, because I fancy lego toys way back. What’s more, the floor is the only spacious place I can settle down comfortably and conveniently while having a ball with my bricks.

happy - on cloud nine / in high spirits

And— besides, what’s more, not only but also, on the one hand on the other hand

paint the town red 狂欢

go with the flow 顺其自然

PART TWO/THREE

地点类

小地方：用第一视角

大地方：如果题目是：

interesting：Modern but historic

famous：be famous for its modrn facilities and long history

modern：

  • city center：skyscrapers：(landmark:Canton Tower：appreciate the panorama(全景) of the city/cityscape)

  • amusement park - castle / tourist / a must-go place

  • (Office blocks - multinational companies - job opportunities)

Historic:

  • historical sites:chen clan academy/know more about the local culture

  • Traditional food - local restraurant - be established for hundreds of years/ at the weekend,/tourists(residents) line up

Describe a city that you think is interesting.（大地方）

I would like to talk about GZ,which is locate in the southern China.since it is a modren but historic city, a lot tourists find it intersting to visit.

First of all , it is equipped with modren facilities ,including skyscrapers and all kinds of entertainment venues.toursit attractions.in the city center,there are landmarks, such as the canton tower.with the high-speed elevator,people can reach the fooftop within only 1 minute. After that,they can appreciate the panoprama of the whole city.Besides,it is famous for the Changlong amusement park,which is a must-go destination. You can enjoy all kinds of amusement there,like rollercoaster ,haunted house,etc.

At the same time ,the city is really famous for its long history.There are many historical sites like chen clan academy and many history museums which display / exhibit a great nunber of antiques.What’s more ,this city is renowned /well-known for its food culture.You can find a lot of Cantonese dishes/cuisine.at the weekend,walking in the street,you can see a lot of tourists even residents line up in front of doors.

To be honest, i consider it as an interesting city not only because of its advanced infrastructure but also because of its long history.

Describle a house or an apartment you would like to live in(小地方)

Actually I’m not that into spacious accommodation like villa and castle etc, which gives me a sense of insecurity. My ideal apartment needn’t to be very big but have to possess furnitures I’m gonna mention.

Walking into the living room,since I am a movie fan, there should be a super big screen on the left. And What is opposite to it is a set of leather sofa which can offer me a cozy sitting area to admire the movie.in the end of the room, I would like to have a french window which faces to the sun and let the room be filled with enough sunshine so I can bask comfortably.

As for my own room,I would like to have a high-powered computer and gaming chair which I can play and develop games more efficiently. beside the computer, I want a huge glass cabinet to collect my Lego set and all kinds of other toys and works of art.

What’s more, The best location of my apartment is in a quiet and harmonious neighborhood, I really don’t like hustle and bustle and I don’t wanna be woken up at midnight.

to be honest, if i can live in such a place,I can spend my whole day and never get bored.

A place you visited on vacation and would like to recommend it to others

A quiet place you like to go

A new place you visited

A place in a village that you visited (a café bar in a village)

café bar

  • 开头

    • I would like to talk about a cafe called Luckin, which is located in the heart of city.(位置根据问题变动)
    • Since it is adjacent my campus, I garb a cup of coffee there pretty much every week.
    • Since it is well decorated, it is pretty popular among all the students

  • 中间 *(总特点 + 方位词 + 描述)*

    • 总特点: exquisite/ well-decorated/ beautifully-decorated/ a two-story cafe
    • 大小: As big as a basketball court/ approximately 100 square meter
    • 内饰(Interior design): a glass cabinet with a lot of yummy/ palatable cakes/ desserts/ snacks
      • barista 咖啡师 /bar tender 酒保 (visit… alone: see how he make coffee)
      • A leather sofa with some colorful and soft cushions on it - have a chitchat with some of my friends
      • long black/ espresso/ latte
      • *落地窗: French windows*
      • 大吊灯: chandelier 小吊灯: ceiling lamp
      • admire/ appreciate the of cityscape

  • there are French windows leading out onto the terrace. This has a beautiful display of pots of roses at that time of the year

An important river/lake in your country

The Yellow River, a great river in northern China, is about 5000 kilometers long.The 6th longest river in the world and the second longest river in China.

why—the name is because of the sediment and sand flowing in the river. so the river looks yellow.

The Yellow River was the birthplace of ancient Chinese civilization,The Chinese call it the “Mother River”. Its water can be diverted to irrigate surrounding farmland.Several hydropower stations have been built on the Yellow River to generate electricity for human use. There are frequent devastating floods produced by the continual elevation of the river bed, sometimes above the level of its surrounding farm fields.

double-blade sword

I’ve been there once. Shocked by the significant landscape.

Turbulent湍急（not good for transport）

人物类

框架

  • Who & how you know them(+ first impression)

  • (appearance) - 可有可无

  • personality

    • Plan A：1 personality：2-3个小例子<每个一句话>+1个具体例子<3-5句>（重点在人物，而不在故事）；
    • plan B：1 personality：相关例子；1 personality：相关例子。

  • what they do/did

1.Describe a person who solved a problem in a smart way

7.A family member you want to work with in the future

I would like to talk about Tom,my senior schoolmates in the university ,who is also our team leader in one programming competition.

He is the person who always raise up hand in the class, and the first one who find the professor’s mistake when coding.

It is a hot summer afternoon and all of us were getting more and more and more anxious about one unsolved problem ,which seemed need very complicated calculation. we tried tons of different advanced algorithms and formula but all result in failure.As we all thought that maybe the problem needed a rare algorithm which we hadn’t learned yet. actually we were about to give up, Tom suddenly stood out and said that why didn’t we use the most basic algorithm and just look into the problem itself, instead of assuming it so hard and would definitely lead to a very complicated solution? We thought it was reasonable so we made every possible effort by finding clues in the given info and guessing. finally Tom found that it implied in the title and the number series is just a Fibonacci series.

He is so calm and even can look the problem in a different way in such a tense situation. I really admire him by his flexibility and wisdom, he also gives me a lesson that don’t complicate a problem by its surface,look deep inside or in a different way maybe you will find it is just a piece of cake.

2.A neighbor you are interested in

3.Someone you really like to spend time with

I would like to talk about my aunt/neighbor Jane.

she is an excellent cook, also a careful and warmhearted person. She always invite my family to her home to have dinner which is really tasty and have various dishes,she is willing to share her cuisine with my mom. and she also denotes to the charity to help the starving kids in Africa.

…

she is really nice and caring and I think that’s why she is well-beloved by the family/neighborhood.

4.A person who you follow on social media

I would like to talk about a food vlogger I followed on the YouTube.

there was a time I was searching some interesting videos on youtube and I saw a cover with very tasty kung pao chicken and a girl with broad smile on the main page. So I clicked in and watched the video which was really good so I’ve started to follow the vlogger.

Through her post, I could say she is a really careful and warmhearted person. Her video is extremely specific about the steps to make a dish and all ingredients that you need to prepare. she also donates most of her video profits to the charity to help the starving kids in Africa.

I can still remember that when I want to cook a special longevity noodles for my mother’s birthday by watching her tutor video. But even I followed every steps I still failed. So i texted her about my issues but since she had tons of followers so I didn’t expect she would reply. Surprisingly, she did! She asked me to send a picture about all my ingredients then she find the problem that I used a different type of noodles. So according to my noodles she taught me to shorten the boiling time about one and a half minutes.then I made it! After I succeed she praised me and bid my mom happy bitrhday.

she even reuploded the video which added some discription about my situation, she is really nice and caring. I think that’s why she has a lot of followers.

5.A famous person you are interested in

6.A businessman you admire

8.A person who has made contribution to the society

Elon musk

want to experience about this kind of living style

Do people like to spend their leisure time out in your country?

In my opinion, it depends on an individual’s hobbies, money, and time. I believe most people are looking forward to “painting the town red” outside of their country to explore not only the different tourist spots but also culture. For instance, I particularly fancy globetrotting around the world because I am curious about how people exist in their day-in and day-out lives in other countries until it turns out to be one of my hobbies. At the same time, I have money to explore and time before I started to work two years ago. Besides, students and the elderly have a lot of time to go on a spree. Unlike blue-collar workers, they are restricted by their work. In a nutshell, these are the following factors I considered.

How do people spend their leisure time in your country?

There are a considerable number of ways. Firstly, people are fond of going to the cinema. For example, my friends and I always hang out in our spare time by catching a glimpse of some motion pictures, especially Science-Fiction. Secondly, others are fond of doing some camping, hiking, or even other kinds of extreme activities outside the town. Lastly, others are more addicted to simmering down at home by knuckling down.

How does technology affect the way people spend their leisure time?

Well, technology really brings people a convenient lifestyle nowadays. Firstly, we can use our gadgets to book our foods, hotels, tour packages and enough to go on a spree. At the same time, we can also do some online shopping to kill time at home. It’s more time-saving and economical. For instance, during my holiday I booked tickets to some playgrounds or parks so we can have a family time or accompany my son to have a ball. Finally, there are some people who are working from home, and during their spare time they can chill out by watching films and playing computer games.

Do you think only old people have time for leisure

Definitely not i think all people have time for leisure it says about dance of the time we have when example the worker they may be have lesser time when they finish their work for students they may have dasher time when they when is there classes i think old people maybe the group who have the most i’m or their own hobbies maybe because they are retired from work and they don’t have much things to do don’t like and workers.

POV of me: go to work for working experiences

if u wanna work in some big IT company

work Expericence capabilitiy to solve a problem are more important than education background.

Manager or university teacher.

further study can see cutting edge knowledge of Computer Science.

learn deeper knowledge in specific area：AI, machine learning, computer vision

both are correct

make decision as early as possible.

It’s important to make a plan about future life and it’s pleasure for me to accept some different views.

A programming project of a class last semester — a system designed for our labs

stayed up late to improve some functions

a lot of argument about the rationality of a specific features

During: made a presentation about our project(including code and functions of our project)

After: when the teacher looked at us with a board smile — felt release

highest score of the class

6.Describe a lesson you remember?

As I major in software engineering, there was a lesson called Algorithm which is one of my required course and may be the most difficult and significant in my college career. I had heard that it needed high coding level and excellent mathematical thought. I was afraid that I would fail the exam so before I attended the lecture, I had done much preparation including watching tutorial video online and coding the program ,which we were supposed to do in the class.

On that eveing I went to the lesson, The teacher begun to teach us some sort algorithms, which meant making a random number array become ordered. There were many categories of them with different efficiency such as bubble sort, insertion sort heap sort and quick sort. Some of my classmates found it pretty hard but I thought it was OK since I had coded all the programs in advanced.

preview

In the end, I finished the assignment by 30 minutes and it really gave me a sense of accomplishment. After that, I felt more confidence and interested about the lesson. I put much more passion and effort to learn the lesson, although it was time-consuming but finally I got a pretty good score.

11.A time when you were very busy

apply for summer intern

before:My friends apply the same intern as me at almost the same time , we all experienced one coding test and three rounds of interviews, he received the offer but I didn’t. I thought I failed so I contacted the human resource but the said I ‘m still under evaluating.I can’t fall asleep, tossed and turned. I was so anxious that I stayed up late to search some information on the social media and I even can’t concentrate on my study

**during:**then I realized my anxiety didn’t push me to prepare for the following job interview but made me inefficient to finish my job.so I clear all the rubbish out of my head and adjust myself for one day. after that I put all my effort on the preparation of the following job interview, stop guessing whether I could receive the offer.

9.A time when you were caught in a traffic jam

I’ve been caught in traffic jams countless times. , I live in Guangzhou, a city which crowded with people and vehicle It’s insane. Sometimes you can spend hours trying to get to a place which should ideally take about 20 minutes, just because of the sheer volume of traffic on the roads. However,

I had set off two hours early to go for a really important job interview but, actually, on a good day it should only be 30 minutes in a cab, at most.

So, I hailed a taxi. The traffic looked bearable – and we set off. As soon as we hit the second ring road there was an incredible traffic jam – it was not even moving. Thick thick traffic as far as the eye could see, and not even moving an inch. The driver told me that he had heard on the radio,that there had been a car accident up ahead which had caused the traffic to come to a standstill. I sat there, quite patiently at first, but then I started to lose patience. An hour went by, and we had progressed about 200 meters up the road, and were literally crawling along. I finally couldn’t stand it because I was about to be late.

so I jumped out of the car and I got a public bicycle then I rode to the company.

In the end I arrived at the interview over 40 minutes too late, The funny thing is – they actually ended up giving me the job!!! I couldn’t believe it! So, all in all that was a really memorable traffic jam!

What household appliances make us lazy?

Dishwasher, television, and so on. Although we have to admit that we are now in a modern society, which means to say, we can experience the benefits of artificial intelligence in furniture or devices. For instance, once the television in my home is turned on, I sometimes become a couch potato. It makes me kill time and leads to an unproductive day. Besides, if I want to feast on mouth-watering dishes, I don’t need to be anxious about how I can clean up all my mess because I can just put them inside the dishwasher machine. Overall, advanced household appliances can make me feel loosened up.

What kind of invention can be used at school?

A projector can be useful and meaningful for students. We have to admit that we are captivated by grasping various lessons if we can see them perfectly instead of imagining what the professor wants to tell us. For example, in our school, every classroom has a big screen on the stage to exhibit their powerpoint presentation with pictures and videos to broaden our horizons. Therefore, it is both convenient and beneficial to learners and teachers.

Do you think Al will replace human teachers?

Well, I beg to disagree, because when it comes to ability, mentally and emotionally they are distinctive from each other. Besides, I believe that the best teacher is experience, and the only one who can encounter this is the teacher because the AI is only programmed by humans. For instance, my Filipino teacher and Chinese teacher used to motivate me if I was struggling with my studies. Unfortunately, my series cannot understand me if I have something to ask, particularly about some emotional questions related to my gordian knot. So, even though we are in a modern society, there is no chance to replace human teachers with AI.

What is the most helpful innovation at home? Why?

16.A long walk you ever had

​ As long as I can remember, there was a time my friends and I went to a bar. we chatted freely, laughed and drank a lot of beer.

at about 2 a.m. the bar was closed and the shopkeeper had to ask us to leave. We were not totally drunk, with the last of our consciousness , staggering and wandering one the street.

neither of us wanted to go home. Our topics were from school ,arents to the planet, cosmos.

as we walked across nearly half of the district, as we were still rambling, we arrived a market of farm produce. It was about 4 or 5 a.m.

we found out that here were already a lot of people, we realized they are vendors, sold their vegetables and meats. get up very early—prepare

we suddenly drop into silence,seeing others making a living toughly but we were just amusing ourself to death. Guilty—go home.

we had only seen the prosperous night life but never seen other side of the city.—thanks to the midnight long walk.

QRcode

Feelings towards this rule were complex

It was the necessary measure to stop the spread of the coronavirus.

school were densely populated and students could barely keep a reasonable social distance considering their collective lifestyle. if one of us was infected, the whole school would soon collapse. But it

this confinement lasted for over two months and no matter how bored we were, no one had ever broken the rules. we were surely afraid of the punishment. but most importantly, we did not want to endanger others because of our misbehavior.

Scanning tiktok and youtube

when I only wanna have a break after study and grab my mobile phone for a rest — when I realize, a couple of hours have passed
感受: scanning social media — cannot stay efficient and focus on work — can’t finish work on time — feel stress and anxious
BUT modern people cannot live without social media(news/ information of friends) — dilemma
SOLUTION: choose a certain time to read messages and make this regularly.

When I was a freshman in the campus — learn about some knowledge of the competitive programming — some algorithms leave me a deep impression of solving a hard problem in seconds & most winners of regional contest get a well-paid job — admire them and begin learning algorithms that won’t be taught in class.
tried three times but all failed to get a bronze award
打铁原因:

  1. COVID-19 — all contests become online — online contest offer more room for the participants — 1000 teams in a contest only one fifth of them can get a prize

Part One:

I am presently a fourth-year undergraduate s

entry.title: LEETCODE问题集
entry.content:
4. 寻找两个正序数组的中位数

思路

二分查找

把问题转换为找两个数组中第k大的数，当n+m为奇数，中位数是两个数组中第$(m+n+1)/2$个元素，当n+m为偶数，中位数是第$(m+n)/2$和$(m+n)/2+1$个数的平均数。

实现比较恶心，每个数组分别定义一个偏移量offs1和offs2，令mid1=offs1+k/2-1,mid2=offs2+k/2-1每次比较a[mid1]和b[mid2]，根据上面的思路，a[mid1]>=b[mid2]那mid1及以前的数字都可被排除了，偏移量offset1+=k/2(因为包括a[mid1]所以是k/2-1+1)。因为现在已经排除了k/2个数字，k-=k/2。反之亦然。

现在还有一个需要考虑的就是边界情况，有可能offs1+k/2-1已经超过数组范围，所以要和数组长度n取一个min，同理在更新offs1和k的时候也要取min，因为如果mid1超过数组范围的话可以排除的数的个数就不是k/2个，而是n个。我们知道当k==1时答案就是此时a[offs1],b[offs2]的最小值。因为到这一步意味着我们已经排除了k-1个数字，只差最后一个就能找到第k大的元素。但如果k还没到1就有一边数组超出边界了呢？如果a数组二分到头了，那就直接返回b[offs2+k-1]就是答案了。考虑a数组为空的情况，offs2=0，就相当于直接找b[k-1]（下标从0开始）

10. 正则表达式匹配

思路

  • $f[i][j]$表示s的前i个字符和p的前j个字符匹配情况。

  • $p[j]!=’*’$

    • $f[i][j]=f[i-1][j-1]&&(s[i]==p[j]||p[j]==’.’)$
    • 当$i,j$前面的都相等，并且当前$s[i]=p[j]$或者$p[j]$为’.’说明$f[i][j]=true$

  • $p[j]==’*’$

    • $f[i][j]=f[i][j-2]||f[i-1][j-2]&&s[i]==p[j]||f[i-2][j-2]&&s[i]==p[j]&&s[i-1]==p[j]$
    • ‘*’可以代表多个字符，第一项意味着*前面的字符有0个(相当于*和前面的字符共两个字符一起消去了所以是$f[i][j-2]$)，第二项是*可以代表一个它前面的字符，以此类推。

  • 但遍历一遍*的可能情况是$O(n)$的，考虑优化。

    • $f[i][j]=f[i][j-2]||f[i-1][j-2]&&s[i]==p[j-1]||f[i-2][j-2]&&s[i]==p[j-1]&&s[i-1]==p[j-1]$
    • $f[i-1][j]=f[i-1][j-2]||f[i-2][j-2]&&s[i-1]==p[j-1]||f[i-3][j-2]&&s[i-1]==p[j-1]&&s[i-2]==p[j-1]$
    • 综上可得$f[i][j]=f[i][j-2]||f[i-1][j]&&(s[i]==p[j-1])$,只需要保留上一层循环的结果即可。时间复杂度$O(1)$,(这里为什么是$p[j-1]$是因为$p[j]$是’*’)
    • 类似于完全背包的优化方案

11. 盛最多水的容器

22. 括号生成

思路

dfs

dp

32. 最长有效括号

思路

栈里面存的是最后一个没有被匹配的括号的下标。

  • 如果是’(‘直接入栈。
  • 是’)’如果栈内有元素就将栈顶弹出。弹出后栈空了说明该右括号失配

42. 接雨水

思路

双指针的前置算法

提前求出lmax和rmax

双指针

左指针和右指针分别从两端开始，维护一个lmax和rmax，分别代表左右两边当前的最高高度。注意如果$h[l]<h[r]$移动左指针。

单调栈

54. 螺旋矩阵

思路

螺旋矩阵2改一改，考虑一下行列不同的情况。

59. 螺旋矩阵 II

思路

124. 二叉树中的最大路径和

思路

对于这颗二叉树，可能的路径情况有

  1. b + a + c
  2. b + a + a 的父结点
  3. a + c + a 的父结点

把b节点思考成一坨左子树，c节点思考成一坨右子树。

如果b整体比0小那直接不用选了，c同理。

考虑从小往上递归。对于每一个节点，他都有可能作为一个”转折点”，或者作为一个单边继续向上递归。

206. 反转链表

思路

事先存一个空节点

92. 反转链表 II

思路

$O(2*n)$

找到left的前一个节点，left节点，right的后一个节点，right节点。对left到right这一段链表进行反转操作，然后再接回去。

$O(n)$

头插法

entry.title: 使用hexo基于cactus仙人掌主题最全美化客制教程
entry.content:
前言

  • 话不多说先上个自己的网站 Across the Cosmos，目前还是用的github page，域名已经购买了但还没有备案，后续打算自己买个服务器再将博客部署上去，之后有空也会更新一篇相关的教程。

  • 最近无聊试着用hexo搭了一下个人网站，如果还不会使用和部署hexo，可以参考这篇博客,作者写得非常细致，从安装hexo一直到将自己的博客部署到github（不过作者用的主题是next），照着一步步做应该不会有什么问题。如果遇到问题可以参考一下我这篇问题日志，希望可以帮到你。

  • 当我把我的博客部署好后，我陷入了选择困难症。好看的主题实在是太多了，不知道怎么选。虽然next、butterfly等主题网上教程很多，但是布局和功能我自认为稍微有点复杂，而且我实在不想和这么多人撞博客。几经波折我最终选择了cactus 仙人掌这个主题（github仓库，网站demo）。这个主题一共有四种风格。整体非常简洁大气。

  • 你也许一开始也会跟我有意义的焦虑：这个博客太简约了，而且网上的教程又少，会不会很多自己想要的功能都没法实现？本篇博客就致力于教你用cactus最大化客制你自己的博客。

正文

安装cactus主题

  • 进入hexo所在的文件夹（我是 cd ./Desktop/Blog）

  • 执行git clone https://github.com/probberechts/hexo-theme-cactus.git themes/cactus。

    如果timeout就用ssh连接git cline git@github.com:probberechts/hexo-theme-cactus.git themes/cactus

  • 然后在./_config.yml中修改theme

切换主题的风格

  • 前面提到了cactus主题有四个风格，切换风格只需要进入./themes/cactus/_config.yml中找到colorscheme修改就完事，注意每次修改完都需要hexo clean hexo g 才会生效

导航栏相关

新建一个导航栏的项

  • 在./themes/cactus/_config.yml找到nav

​ 直接在nav下面添加就行，添加完这一项之后可以让它指向一个链接（例如projcets），也可以让它指向站内的一个页面。新建一个页面执行hexo new page xxx，然后这个页面的路径就是/xxx/

  • 更新后会在./themes/cactus/source中发现一个和page名称一样的文件夹

让导航栏中的某一项显示内容在首页

  • 以project为例，只需在./themes/cactus/source中创建/_data/projects.json，然后修改json文件为

在导航栏添加搜索功能

  • 在./themes/cactus/_config.yml中找到nav 新建search标签

  • 执行npm install hexo-generator-search --save

  • 执行hexo new page search

  • 进入./themes/cactus/source/serch/index.md，修改md文件的头为

  • 更新之后进入网站，点击search就可以搜索了

新增标签功能

  • 只需要在每篇文章的头部添加

​ 就可以在首页看到

  • 每篇文章可以有两个tag，tag的顺序影响其重要程度

开启评论功能

  • cactus支持Disqus和Utterances两个平台的评论功能，只需要在./themes/cactus/_config.yml分别找到它们就行。
  • 以Disqus为例，把enable设置为true，然后再去Disqus官网注册个账号,认证邮箱后在shortname处填上自己的昵称就行

  • 之后就能愉快的评论了，不过Disqus现在好像必须要梯子才能正常使用。

添加其他社交平台链接

  • 在./themes/cactus/_config.yml搜索Social media links

然后前面就是社交平台的名称，后面就是你该社交平台的url，注意这里只能选Font awesome上有的icon，才会显示对应的icon，进入网站搜索社交平台的英文名就能看到是否有这个icon了，这里列出几个比较常见的：weibo weixin zhihu rss。

增加数据分析

  • 在./themes/cactus/_config.yml中，搜索analytics，cactus支持以下几种数据分析功能，说白了就是后台管理。
  • 以百度分析为统计，先去百度统计官网注册一个账号，然后在网站列表点击新增网站

  • 填写相关信息

  • 然后在代码管理->代码获取页面复制这一段，这就是你的tracking_id

  • 然后回到./themes/cactus/_config.yml，修改这里的id，enabled设置为true
  • 进入百度统计的代码管理->代码安装检查，点击开始检查，如果显示代码安装正确，过一会就能显示你网站统计的数据了。

自定义字体/颜色和网站logo/icon

自定义颜色

  • 进入./themes/cactus/source/css/colors中有四个文件，对应不同风格的样式

  • 别的参数我没有调过，大家可以自己修改试一试

自定义字体

  • 进入./themes/cactus/source/css/_variables.styl，就可以修改字体了
  • 可用的字体在./themes/cactus/source/lib/中，cactus自带的只有meslo-LG vazir-font两种，有需要可以自己下载。

自定义网站logo/icon

  • 在./themes/cactus/source/images/下有四张图片

  • apple-touch-icon是苹果产品将网站的快捷方式添加到主屏幕所显示的logo

  • logo就是显示在你网页上的那个东西，设计logo的网站，里面有很多半成品，拿来就能用。
  • favicon-192x192就是192x192像素的logo.png，网上随便找个软件就能压缩
  • favicon.ico有点难搞，因为它一个文件里面有不同规格的ico，我是用了一个叫氢贝的软件弄的，里面可以直接将各种图片格式转化为多规格的ico，非常方便。

添加点击量功能

  • 进入./themes/cactus/_config.yml添加下面一段代码
  • 进入./themes/cactus/layout/_partial/footer.ejs将其全部修改覆盖为
  • 有前端基础的可以加在footer的别的位置甚至加在header.ejs里，核心代码就是
  • 效果

结语

  • 其他的一些功能可以去看cactus官方文档
  • 如果之后还发现了有趣的功能会持续更新

entry.title: 2021GDUFS新手赛D-DUNE 题解
entry.content:
题面

题目背景

这个沙漠星球，我们称之为厄拉科斯（Arrakis）。

而它的原住民称其母星为沙丘（Dune）。

厄拉科斯在繁星的映衬下逐渐出现：一个沙漠世界。

一股巨大的铁锈色沙暴飓风正在厄拉科斯的赤道上缓慢地移动。
一艘隐形飞船驾向厄拉科斯大地：造型奇异的双座工具，完全光滑，深黑，没有标志……

厄崔迪家族从哈克南家族手中接过了厄拉科斯的统治权,现在正是将所有物资运往厄拉科斯的关键时刻.厄崔迪男爵不想出任何问题,于是委托你——厄崔迪家族的首席飞船调度员,来安排飞船的航线.

题目描述

你要安排的航线系统可以表示成一个二维的平面图.你的飞船调度室在$(0,0)$.从西到东,从南到北各有100条航道.不同的运输飞船会同时从各个航道的起点,可以表示为$(0,i)$或$(j,0)$ $(1<=i<=100,1<=j<=100)$以相同速度起飞,现在有n架从西到东和m架从南到北的飞船,(每条航道上最多只能有一架飞船),在保证所有飞船都不相撞的情况下,想要运输最多的物资——也就是让能同时起飞的飞船最多.你想知道具体能最多让多少架飞船同时起飞?

输入格式

第一行输入一个整数$n(1<=n<=100)$和一个整数$m(1<=m<=100)$,表示$n$架从西向东和$m$架从南面向北的飞船,第二行输入$n$个飞船分别起飞的航道,第三行输入$m$个飞船分别起飞的航道.(保证输入的每一条航道上只有一个飞船)

输出格式

输出一个整数,表示最多可以保留的飞船数.

题解

  • 注意到所有飞船都是相同速度，那么$X_{i}$会和$Y_j$航道上的飞船当且仅当$i=j$。所以只要统计所有$i=j$的情况，减去任意一艘，最后就是答案。
  • $O(n^2)$
  • $O(n)$

entry.title: 2021GDUFS新手赛F-Reinhart的德州扑克 题解
entry.content:
https://www.luogu.com.cn/problem/U188446

题面

题目背景

德州扑克是目前世界上最流行的扑克游戏，全世界有众多相关的比赛，例如是 WSOP，WPT，EPT等，也让这款游戏的玩法变得层出不穷，丰富多变。

不要被简单的游戏规则而误导，复杂多变的比赛状况，让这款游戏在高水平的竞技中会变得非常复杂，这也让人们为德州扑克给出了这样一句评价“用一刻就能学会，但要用一生才能掌握”。

题目描述

现在我们并不在乎游戏规则是什么,因为Reinhart是一个德州扑克高手,他对于德州扑克的规则烂熟于心,不过他每次都记不得牌型的大小关系,他知道你是一个编程高手,所以他想让你帮他写一个程序:输入五张牌的大小和花色,输出这五张牌能组成的最大牌型.你能帮帮他吗?

为了降低你的编程难度,我们规定:

  1. 输入的牌都是来源于同一副扑克牌.
  2. 输入的牌的点数都是非递减的.
  3. 所有花色没有大小之分.

下面给出各牌型,(从大到小)

  1. 皇家同花顺(ROYAL FLUSH):五张顺连的牌(点数连续单调递增),且最大的一张牌是A(Ace),并且五张牌的花色相同.
  2. 同花顺(STRAIGHT FLUSH):五张顺连的牌(点数连续单调递增),不规定最大的一张牌是A(Ace),并且五张牌的花色相同.
  3. 四条(FOUR OF A KIND):至少四张牌的点数相同.
  4. 葫芦(FULL HOUSE):至少三张牌的点数相同,并且除此之外还有两张牌的点数相同.
  5. 同花(FLUSH):五张牌的花色都相同.
  6. 顺子(STRAIGHT):五张顺连的牌(点数连续单调递增),不要求五张牌的花色相同.
  7. 特别注意:由于Reinhart是个谨慎的人,所以比三条(THREE OF A KIND)(包括三条)小的牌型Reinhart不在乎他们的大小关系,你只需要告诉Reinhart弃牌就行

输入格式

输入两行,每行五个数字,第一行的第$i$个字符表示第$i$张扑克的点数,
第二行的第$i$个数字表示第$i$张扑克花色.(保证输入的牌的点数是非递减的)

点数和对应输入的数字:

  • 2 - 10 对应 2 - 10
  • J(Jack) 对应 11
  • (Queen) 对应 12
  • K(King) 对应 13
  • A(Ace) 对应 14

花色和对应输入的数字:

  • 黑桃(Spades) 对应 1
  • 方片(Diamonds) 对应 2
  • 红桃(Hearts) 对应 3
  • 梅花(Clubs) 对应 4

输出格式

输出这五张牌能组成的最大牌型.

  • 如果最大是皇家同花顺输出”ROYAL FLUSH”
  • 如果最大是同花顺输出”STRAIGHT FLUSH”
  • 如果最大是四条输出”FOUR OF A KIND”
  • 如果最大是葫芦输出”FULL HOUSE”
  • 如果最大是同花输出”FLUSH”
  • 如果最大是顺子输出”STRAIGHT”
  • 如果最大的牌型小于等于三条输出”FOLD”,劝Reinhart弃牌.
  • 输出不包括引号

题解

  • 按照题意模拟即可，虽然题目规定输入一定是非递减输入，但要仍然要注意一些顺序问题，具体见代码。
entry.summary: https://www.luogu.com.cn/problem/U188446

entry.title: 使用HEXO搭建博客问题日志
entry.content:
1.解决 Failed to connect to github.com port 443:connection timed out

  • 当使用hexo d的时候，一直连接超时。

方案汇总：

  • 换一个网络，或等一段时间可能会好

  • 执行git config --global --unset http.proxy

  • 进入hexo文件夹里的_config.yml文件

    将repo: https://github.com/xxx/xxx.io.git更改为ssh地址

    repo: git@github.com:xxx/xxx.github.io.git

    一定要注意yml文件的格式问题（:后有空格）

  • 去这个网站，搜出github.com的ip地址后记下来

​

​ 执行sudo vi /etc/hosts,按a进行插入，插入一条140.82.114.4 github.com(具体ip地址根据你当时的查询结果而定)，然后按esc再按两次大写的Z退出。这时候再执行hexo d应该就不会出现超时的问题了，但你可能会发现执行几次hexo d之后超时问题又会出现，这个时候你就再sudo vi /etc/hosts重新查询一下github的ip地址然后修改一下，如果查出来和之前的插入的是相同的就直接吧插入的删掉，再执行hexo d，如果还是不行就再插入，多试几次就好了。

2.解决remote: Support for password authentication was removed on August 13, 2021. Please use a personal access token instead.

请看这篇博客

3.解决remote: Permission to xxx/xxx.github.io.git denied to xxx.

fatal: unable to access ‘https://github.com/reinhart-l/reinhart-l.github.io.git/': The requested URL returned error: 403

  • 当hexo d成功后让你输入用户名和密码，可能会出现以上报错

    注意这里输入的密码是github的token token如何获取请看这篇博客

方案汇总：

  • 若报错形如remote: Permission to XXXA/xxxx.git denied to XXXB

    可能是电脑上有多个ssh密钥和用户导致的，详细解决可以看这篇博客

  • 若用户名和密钥对应，去github检查一下token的repo权限有没有开。

4.解决hexo搭建Github博客上传后，网页显示404问题

  • 进入hexo文件夹里的_config.yml文件

    将repo: git@github.com:xxx/xxx.github.io.git更改为https地址

    repo: https://github.com/xxx/xxx.github.io.git

  • 其他解决方案参考这篇博客

entry.title: PTA 挖地雷
entry.content:
题目描述:

在一个地图上有n个地窖（n≤200）,每个地窖中埋有一定数量的地雷。同时，给出地窖之间的连接路径，并规定路径都是单向的,且保证都是小序号地窖指向大序号地窖，也不存在可以从一个地窖出发经过若干地窖后又回到原来地窖的路径。某人可以从任意一处开始挖地雷，然后沿着指出的连接往下挖（仅能选择一条路径），当无连接时挖地雷工作结束。设计一个挖地雷的方案，使他能挖到最多的地雷。

输入格式:

第一行：地窖的个数；

第二行：为依次每个地窖地雷的个数；

下面若干行：

xi yi 表示从xi可到yi，xi<yi。

最后一行为”0 0”表示结束。

输出格式:

k1-k2−…−kv 挖地雷的顺序 挖到最多的雷。

输入样例:

输出样例:

思路:

本题是一个数字三角形模型的动态规划,定义$dp[i]$为到第i个点能挖到的最多地雷数,因为题目保证都是小序号地窖指向大序号地窖,所以转移方程为$dp[j]=max(dp[j],dp[i]+p[j])$($p[j]是点j的地雷数$).本题难点是记录路径.我们可以用一个数组path[i],每次dp方程转移时记录转移到该点的上一个点是谁($path[j]=i$),最后再找到能挖到最多地雷数的那个点,倒序输出path即可.

Hint:

  • 如果wa最后一个点可以试试这个测试样例:
  • 记得要将$dp[i]初始化为p[i]$

代码:
entry.summary:
题目描述:

在一个地图上有n个地窖（n≤200）,每个地窖中埋有一定数量的地雷。同时，给出地窖之间的连接路径，并规定路径都是单向的,

entry.title: 第 45 届国际大学生程序设计竞赛（ICPC）亚洲区域赛（南京）E.Evil Coordinate (分类讨论+模拟)
entry.content:
https://ac.nowcoder.com/acm/contest/21739/E

  • 这题有更简单的做法(枚举UDLR全排列),我用这个分类讨论的方法折腾了2个半小时才终于AC….

思路:

  • 1.首先我们可以想到,给定了一个走法的序列,不管这个序列的排列是怎样,它的终点一定确定了.所以炸弹(mx,my)如果在起点(0,0)或终点(x,y)那结果肯定是$Impossible$.

  • 2.还有一种$Impossible$的情况就是当X轴方向没有步数($Cnt_R=0&&
    Cnt_L=0$)且炸弹在Y轴方向的必经之路上;当Y轴方向没有步数($Cnt_U=0&&
    Cnt_D=0$)且炸弹在X轴方向的必经之路上.

  • 3.除去上面两种,剩余情况都是总能找到一个序列使机器人不经过炸弹的. 我们可以分情况讨论:

    • a.终点不在坐标轴上

      我们将路径简化为两种,先横着走再后竖着走和先竖着走再横着走.

    这种情况比较简单,只需要判断炸弹是否在任意一条路径上,那么不走这条路径即可.例如:若炸弹在1上,那就走2;若炸弹在2上或者炸弹在其他地方,那就走1.

    • b.终点在坐标轴上

      这种情况看似简单,实则比较复杂.例如:终点在Y轴上,那说明L和R的步数相等.但先L或先R可能会对答案造成影响,所以我们要进行一些判断.例如:炸弹若在X轴下方,那么我们先U后D肯定不会有问题;炸弹若在Y轴左方,那先R和L肯定不会有问题.(会有问题的我们已经在第二种impossible中筛掉了).这里语言描述起来会比较麻烦,直接看代码应该会比较好理解.

  • 4.最后要注意一下正负号的问题,然后把每种情况交代清楚,应该就能AC了.

代码:

entry.title: PTA 租用游艇问题
entry.content:
题目描述

长江游艇俱乐部在长江上设置了n个游艇出租站1，2，…，n。游客可在这些游艇出租站租用游艇，并在下游的任何一个游艇出租站归还游艇。游艇出租站i到游艇出租站j之间的租金为r(i,j),1<=i<j<=n。试设计一个算法，计算出从游艇出租站1 到游艇出租站n所需的最少租金。

输入格式:

第1 行中有1 个正整数n（n<=200），表示有n个游艇出租站。接下来的第1到第n-1 行，第i行表示第i站到第i+1站,第i+2站, … , 第n站的租金。

输入样例:

输出样例:

题解:

我们可以想到如果要求第1个站到第n站的租金最小值,所可以$O(N^2)$枚举1->n站之间所有可能的情况——比如从第1个站到第3个站可以直接从第1个站到第3个站，也可以从第1个站先到第2个站再从第2个站到第3个站.所以我们需要用一个数组$dp[i][j]$记录第i个站到第j个站的最小租金,不断通过枚举更新这个数组,最终$dp[1][n]$就是第1个站到第n个站的最小租金,也就是我们要求的答案.

entry.title: CCPC 2021 网络预选赛重赛 hdu 7131-Nun Heh Heh Aaaaaaaaaaa (计数dp-公共子序列模型)
entry.content:

题意

给定一个序列s,求其[前缀是𝚗𝚞𝚗𝚑𝚎𝚑𝚑𝚎𝚑,后缀是>=1个a]的子序列个数

题解

先求出子序列为nunhehheh的个数,定义dp(i,j)为s的前i个字符中和nunhehheh匹配到第j个个数.然后预处理出i后面有多少个a,记为a[i],对于每个dp(i,9)乘$2^{a[i]}$再相加即可得到所有方案数

entry.title: AtCoder Beginner Contest 218-ABCDEF 题解
entry.content:
https://atcoder.jp/contests/abc218/tasks

A - Weather Forecast

水题

B - qwerty

水题

C - Shapes

题意:

两个$NN$矩阵A,B都由和#构成,你可以对B进行任意次90度旋转(正逆时针都可)和对#图形进行整体的平移,如果最后B能和A完全一样输出Yes,否则输出No

题解:

枚举每一种有效的旋转(最多三次),然后每次都将A和B的#图形移到最左上角,看#的数目和位置是否一致.

代码:

D - Rectangles

题意:

在二维平面上给n个坐标,求坐标能构成的所有平行于X,Y轴的矩形的数目.

题解:

以x坐标为基准,当y轴相等时,如果下一条边和这条边的长度、位置都相同,那就可以构成一个矩形.所以只需要枚举所有点,当两个点y坐标相同时记录下两点构成的线段的位置和长度,当下一次又出现同一位置和长度的线段时,就可以构成一个矩形… 以此类推.用一个map记录

代码:

E - Destruction

题意:

给一个无向图,让你从中选出几个边,要求选出的边权总和最大并且剩下的图要是一个连通图.

题解:

要选出的边权总和最大,那就是让剩下的连通图边权总和最小,我们可以很容易想到最小生成树.但直接跑最小生成树是不行的,因为它有负边权.而负边我们是肯定不会选的,所以我们只需要特判一下,只要我们在跑最小生成树只要碰到负边权我们就给把它放进图里.(这样虽然不是树了但可以保证我们得到正确的答案)

代码:

F - Blocked Roads

题意:

给定一个n个点,m条边的有向图,边权为1,对每个边i,求把这个边去掉的1-n的最短距离.

题解:

因为m最大是400399.所以不能直接枚举边bfs.但我们可以想到,对于1->n的最短路来说,最多应该只有n-1条边是有效的,所以我们可以先bfs求一遍正常的1->n的最短路,把有效的边标记出来.然后再枚举m条边,如果这条边没有被标记过,说明去不去掉它对1-n的最短距离没有影响,所以直接输出1-n的最短距离.否则,就再在原图上求一次去掉边i的bfs,时间复杂度是$O_{(N*(N+M))}$

entry.title: Educational Codeforces Round 113 C. Jury Meeting (思维+组合数学)
entry.content:
https://codeforces.com/contest/1569/problem/C

题意:

n个数,每经过一个数它就-1,如果当所有数减完的时候没有一个数连续减了两次那这样一个序列就叫好序列,求所有好序列的数量,答案mod998244353

题解:

我们可以发现不管n是多少,到最后我们都只用看只剩下最后两个数的情况,而剩下的两个数肯定是最大数和次大数.

所以我们可以分以下三种情况讨论:

1.最大数=次大数

和位置无关,所有排列的序列都是好序列,答案为n!

2.最大数>=次大数+2

所有序列都不是好序列,答案为0

3.最大数只有一个,且次大数和最大数的差值为1

我们通过观察可以发现,至少有一个次大数要在最大数的右边才是好序列,那么答案可以为全排列减去次大数全都在最大数左边的情况.

次大数圈都在最大数左边的方案数可以通过枚举最大数的位置来计算:

我们设有cnt个次大数,那么最大数就可以放在n~cnt+1的位置上.设最大数的位置为i,最大数左边的空位就是i-1个,右边的空位就是n- i个,次大数只能放在左边的位置,所以有$ inom{cnt}{i-1}$种放法,现在已经放了cnt个次大数和一个最大数,所以还剩下n-cnt-1个数,剩下的数可以随意放所以就是$(n-cnt-1)!$放法.

$(n-cnt-1)!* inom{cnt}{i-1}$就是最大数放在第i个位置时不合法的方案数,枚举i从n~cnt+1,依次减掉即可.

代码:

entry.title: JAVA 面向对象 | 继承与多态 简单理解和实例
entry.content:
程序需求

1.编写一个 Cat 类，实现 1 个 shout()方法，该方法可以输出小猫的叫声“喵”

2.修改以上程序，为 Cat 类声明一个字段 name 和一个有参的构造函数，以便在实例化对象时，可以设置对象的名字；并使 shout()方法可以根据 name 的值输出对象的名字，如“我的名字叫…，喵”，同时实现默认构造函数。

3.修改以上程序， 自行设计一个有参构造函数并调用。

4.修改以上程序，利用私有字段和 get/set 方法实现能够控制猫的叫声的功能，让它叫几声，它就叫几声，并且能够输出叫声，但是最多叫 10 声。

5.修改以上程序，设计一个静态变量和静态方法统计并显示生成的实例个数。

6.在上一堂课实现的程序基础上，仿照 Cat 类增加一个 Dog 类，也有 shout()方法，能够输出“我的名字叫…. 汪！汪！”等功能。

7.分析 Cat 和 Dog 类的程序，可以发现它们有非常相似的代码。请建立一个父类 Animal 类，把Cat 和 Dog 相同的代码尽量放到 Animal 类中。

8.分析以上程序，可以发现 Cat 和 Dog 类都有 shout（）方法，只是叫的声音不同。请修改上述程序，为 Animal 类建立一个 shout()方法，然后让 Cat 和 Dog 去重写这个 shout()方法，实现多态。

9.在以上程序的基础上，增加牛和羊两种动物，而且都要叫出自己的声音。

10.分析以上程序，可以发现四种动物的 shout()方法中，除了动物叫的声音不同外，几乎是相同的。请把该方法在 Animal 类中实现，但是由于各种动物的叫声不同，需要增加一个方法 getSound()，在子类中获得各种动物的叫声。经过重构，所有的重复都放到父类中，子类变得非常简洁，而且容易修改。

11.由于 Animal 类根本不可能实例化也不需要实例化，所以可以把实例化没有任何意义的父类改成抽象类。请在以上程序的基础上，将 Animal 类改为抽象类，同时 getSound（）也应改为抽象方法。

11.在四种动物中，Cat 和 Dog 能捉老鼠，请将这个功能设计成接口，并分别由 Cat 和 Dog 两种动物继承实现。

UML类图

2.修改以上程序
